headline: Cognizant AI Lab Earns Three New U.S. Patents, Totaling 65 U.S. Patents and 88 International Patents
summary: Cognizant (NASDAQ: CTSH) today announced that its AI Lab has received three new U.S. patents, bringing its total number of U.S. patents to 65 and 88 globally.
